A serve override without router/handler params must not leave an unused
router variable behind.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

//fabrik:http:server
func Serve() error {
	return nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.

package main

import (
	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Serve
	return web.Serve()
}
